I now have all the data needed. Let me compile the full inventory.

---

# oCMS Cache Layer Inventory

*Sources: [`wiki/topics/caching.md`](../llm-wiki-go/wiki/topics/caching.md), [`wiki/sources/docs-caching.md`](../llm-wiki-go/wiki/sources/docs-caching.md), and source code (see § Wiki gaps).*

---

## Layer 1 — Config Cache

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/config.go` · type `ConfigCache` · owned by `cache.Manager` |
| **Env vars** | None control this layer's TTL directly (see § Wiki gaps) |
| **TTL** | 1 h hardcoded (`time.Hour` in `NewConfigCache`); backing `SimpleCache` TTL is advisory — the cache is logically invalidated by flipping a `loaded` bool, not by clock expiry |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateConfig()` ← `handler/config.go` on site-config save; `handler/themes.go` on theme activation and theme-settings save; `handler/cache.go` (manual) |
| **Consumers** | `middleware.LoadSiteConfig` (frontend route only — admin routes pass `nil` to skip cache); `handler/themes.go` (`loadThemeSettings`); hCaptcha config lookups; `Manager.GetConfig` |

---

## Layer 2 — Sitemap Cache

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/sitemap.go` · type `SitemapCache` · owned by `cache.Manager` |
| **Env vars** | None control TTL directly |
| **TTL** | 1 h hardcoded (`time.Hour` passed to `NewSitemapCache`). **This TTL is enforced by clock** — `Get` checks `time.Since(cachedAt) < ttl`. Sitemap is also keyed by `siteURL`; a change in `site_url` config forces a regeneration. |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateSitemap()` ← `handler/cache.go` (manual); `Manager.InvalidateContent()`, `Manager.InvalidatePage(id)`, `Manager.InvalidatePages()` — all of which also invalidate sitemap; triggered by page / category / tag CRUD |
| **Consumers** | `handler/frontend.go:1484` — `FrontendHandler.Sitemap` (`GET /sitemap.xml`) |

---

## Layer 3 — Menu Cache

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/menus.go` · type `MenuCache` · owned by `cache.Manager` |
| **Env vars** | None |
| **TTL** | 1 h hardcoded (`time.Hour` in `NewMenuCache`); relies on invalidation, not clock expiry |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateMenus()` ← `handler/cache.go` (manual); menu and menu-item handlers on create / update / delete |
| **Consumers** | `internal/service/menu.go` (`MenuService.GetMenu`, `GetMenuForLanguage`) → `handler/frontend.go` `buildMenuData` for every frontend page response; `Manager.GetMenu` |

---

## Layer 4 — Language Cache

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/languages.go` · type `LanguageCache` · owned by `cache.Manager` |
| **Env vars** | None |
| **TTL** | 1 h hardcoded (`time.Hour` in `NewLanguageCache`); relies on invalidation |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateLanguages()` ← `handler/cache.go` (manual); language handlers on create / update / delete |
| **Consumers** | `middleware/language.go` — language-detection middleware for multi-language URL routing; `Manager.GetActiveLanguages`, `GetDefaultLanguage`, `GetLanguageByCode`; frontend language-switcher rendering |

---

## Layer 5 — Page Cache

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/pages.go` · type `PageCache` · owned by `cache.Manager` |
| **Env vars** | None |
| **TTL** | 1 h hardcoded (`time.Hour` in `NewPageCache`); relies on invalidation. Internal storage is `map[string]*store.Page`; no time-based expiry on individual entries. |
| **Cache key shape** | `{language}:{role}:{slug}` (slug lookups) and `{language}:{role}:{id}` (ID lookups). Role levels: `anonymous`/`public` → 0, `editor` → 1, `admin` → 2. |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidatePage(id)` (also clears sitemap) ← `handler/pages.go` on specific page write; `Manager.InvalidatePages()` / `InvalidateContent()` ← bulk page ops, category/tag changes; `handler/cache.go` (manual) |
| **Consumers** | `handler/frontend.go:835` (`GetPublishedPageBySlug`) and `:1083` (`GetPublishedPageByID`) — every public page render; `Manager.GetPublishedPageBySlug/ByID` |

---

## Layer 6 — Translation Cache

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/translations.go` · type `TranslationCache` · owned by `cache.Manager` |
| **Env vars** | None |
| **TTL** | **30 minutes** hardcoded (`30 * time.Minute` in `NewTranslationCache`) — uniquely shorter than all other domain caches. Max 10 000 entries; when full, ~50 % of entries are evicted by a simple sweep. |
| **Cache key** | `translations[entityType][entityID]` → `map[langCode]translationID` |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.InvalidateTranslations()` (wipe all) or `Manager.InvalidateTranslation(entityType, entityID)` (entity-scoped) ← translation CRUD handlers; `handler/cache.go` (manual) |
| **Consumers** | Multi-language content resolution — translation link lookups when a frontend request involves content available in multiple languages; `Manager.GetTranslations/GetTranslationsBatch` |

---

## Layer 7 — General Cache (placeholder, currently unoccupied)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/cache/manager.go:72` — `Manager.General` is a `*SimpleCache` with `ThemeSettingsPrefix = "theme_settings_"` |
| **Env vars** | None |
| **TTL** | 5 minutes hardcoded (`New(5 * time.Minute)`); background cleanup runs every 1 minute (started by `Manager.Start()`) |
| **Invalidation** | `Manager.ClearAll()` calls `General.Clear()`; no targeted invalidation method exists |
| **Consumers** | **None in production code.** No production call sites call `m.General.Get` or `m.General.Set`. The field and its cleanup goroutine run, but carry no data. It appears to be infrastructure reserved for future use. |

---

## Layer 8 — API Rate-limiter Cache

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/middleware/api.go` · generic type `limiterCache[K]` · entirely separate from `cache.Manager` |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_API_RATE_LIMIT` (default: `100`) — requests per minute per API key; governs the `rate.Limiter` stored per key |
| **TTL** | Idle-eviction TTL: **10 minutes** (`limiterCacheTTL`). Cleanup goroutine runs every **5 minutes** (`limiterCacheCleanupInterval`). Hard cap: **10 000 entries** (`limiterCacheMaxEntries`); oldest entry evicted on overflow. |
| **Invalidation** | TTL-based auto-eviction only; no programmatic clear path |
| **Consumers** | `middleware.APIRateLimit` — applied to all `/api/v2/*` routes |

---

## Layer 9 — Session Store

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package / file** | `internal/session/session.go` · SCS `SessionManager` backed by `alexedwards/scs/sqlite3store` |
| **Env vars** | `OCMS_SESSION_SECRET` (required, min 32 bytes) — used for cookie encryption, not TTL |
| **TTL** | 24 hours hardcoded (`sm.Lifetime = 24 * time.Hour`) |
| **Invalidation** | Session expiry (clock-based); explicit `SessionManager.Destroy` on logout |
| **Consumers** | All authenticated admin routes (`middleware.Auth`, `middleware.LoadUser`); flash message delivery across redirects |

---

## No `## Contradictions` block to quote

The wiki's caching topic has no `## Contradictions` section.

---

## Wiki gaps

The following facts required direct source reads because the wiki did not contain them.

**Gap 1 — Per-type TTL values are hardcoded, not governed by `OCMS_CACHE_TTL`.**
The wiki states: *"Default TTL for entries: `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (default `3600` seconds)"* without qualification. The source shows each domain cache has its own hardcoded TTL (`time.Hour` for Config/Sitemap/Menus/Languages/Pages; `30 * time.Minute` for Translations; `5 * time.Minute` for General). `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` is only passed as `DefaultTTL` to `cache.Config` used by the `Distributed` backend (`internal/cache/factory.go`, `cmd/ocms/main.go:738`), not to the domain caches.
*Source: `internal/cache/{config,sitemap,menus,languages,pages,translations}.go` constructors; `cmd/ocms/main.go:734–742`.*

**Gap 2 — The distributed (Redis) cache is provisioned but not integrated into domain cache read paths.**
The wiki says Redis provides "multi-instance caching / shared across servers" for all cache types. The source shows `Manager.Distributed` is created when `OCMS_REDIS_URL` is set, but the six domain caches (Config, Sitemap, Menus, Languages, Pages, Translations) store all data in in-memory Go maps and never delegate reads or writes to `m.Distributed`. The distributed field is only consulted in `HealthCheck`, `Stop`, and `ClearAll`. Consequently `OCMS_CACHE_TTL`, `OCMS_CACHE_PREFIX`, and `OCMS_CACHE_MAX_SIZE` have no effect on domain-cache behaviour.
*Source: `internal/cache/manager.go:82–99` (creation); no domain cache file ever references `manager.Distributed`.*

**Gap 3 — `Manager.General` cache (layer 7) is undocumented.**
The wiki and `docs/caching.md` list six cache types; the source reveals a seventh `General *SimpleCache` (5 min TTL) with a `ThemeSettingsPrefix` field. It has no production callers and does not appear in `/admin/cache` stats (`AllStats()` only aggregates the six domain caches).
*Source: `internal/cache/manager.go:52,72–73,122,168,307`.*

**Gap 4 — Rate-limiter cache (layer 8) is entirely undocumented.**
Not mentioned in any wiki or docs page. It is a separate in-memory structure in `internal/middleware/api.go` with its own TTL and size limits.
*Source: `internal/middleware/api.go:923–932`.*

**Gap 5 — Which exact subsystems consume each cache.**
The wiki names the mechanisms (preload, invalidation API) but does not map consumption sites. Identified from source: page cache is consumed exclusively by `handler/frontend.go`; sitemap cache by `FrontendHandler.Sitemap`; config cache by `middleware.LoadSiteConfig` (frontend only) and theme/config handlers.
*Source: `internal/handler/frontend.go:835,1083,1484`; `internal/handler/config.go:392`; `internal/handler/themes.go:116,216`.*
